THE APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT WAS TIMELY PRESENTED TO THE COURT ALONG WITH THE APPROPRIATE FEE. (SEE TREMBLY DECLARATION.) THE CLERK HAD NO LEGAL BASIS UPON WHICH TO REJECT THE FILING. RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. JUDGMENT DEBTOR MICHAEL BENSAL's Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment is Denied. The Application for Renewal of Judgment was timely presented to the Court along with the appropriate fee. (See Trembly Declaration.) The clerk had no legal basis upon which to reject the filing. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to send it by way of e-mail to the court). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185=(302/MJM)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: PETER J. CROSBY, ESQ., 415.547.2700, FOR PLAINTIFF FIRST BANK & TRUST.
BRIAN D. SEIBEL, ESQ., 925.947.1600, FOR DEFENDANT MICHAEL BENSAL.

RULING: Argued and the Court VACATED its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MICHAEL BENSAL's Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment IS CONTINUED FOR FURTHER HEARING TO JUNE 3, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. DEFENDANT TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF BY MAY 23, 2013 AND PLAINTIFF TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY BRIEF BY MAY 29, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Ntc Of Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-09-2013 Continued To May-01-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MICHAEL BENSAL'S Notice Of Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment is continued to May 1, 2013, to give the moving party an opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party shall provide a copy of the moving papers with Department 302 by April 16. Please attach a cover letter to the papers reflecting the new hearing date. The Court has the opposing and reply papers. Moving party's failure to comply with the local rule may result in the motion being denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Authorizing And Directing Court Clerk To Process Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter J. Crosby, Esq. of the Law Offices of David Wiseblood, Tel. 415.547.2700, for plaintiff and moving party;
Brian Seibel, Esq. of Seibel & Finta, Tel. 925.947.1600, specially appearing for defendant Michael Bensal.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: ASSIGNEE THE SMALL BUSINESS ADMINSTRATION's ("SBA") Motion For Order Authorizing And Directing Court Clerk To Process Renewal Of Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed. The clerk is ordered to process the application for renewal of judgment filed on December 10, 2012. Order signed. Judge: Marla J.
